name: ecs_fargate
explanation: ECS Fargate metrics are collected by hitting the task-local ECS Container Metadata Endpoint, either v4 (URL provided in the `ECS_CONTAINER_METADATA_URI_V4` env var) or v2 (the link-local `http://169.254.170.2/v2`). Both endpoints are unauthenticated and reachable only from inside the task. The integration ships a `conf.yaml.default` template with `ad_identifiers: [_ecs_fargate]` that the Agent's Autodiscovery layer uses to schedule the check whenever it detects it is running in a Fargate task. There are no per-instance required fields driving endpoint resolution; the check derives the URL itself at runtime from the environment.
notes: Auto-discovery already works via the `_ecs_fargate` AD identifier. Method is `other` because there is no network probe in the conventional sense; the trigger is 'is this Agent running inside an ECS Fargate task' (env var presence + link-local endpoint reachability), and credentials are not required (the metadata endpoint is task-local and unauthenticated).
